commands.review_summary:
The PR adds WhatsApp lifecycle status reactions and extends shared status-reaction emoji categories/config keys for deploy, build, and concierge tool activity.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings from source: the shared controller’s terminal cleanup calls per-emoji removal, the proposed WhatsApp adapter clears the single current reaction for each removal, and current tests require ack before audio STT. I did not run a live WhatsApp or Telegram account in this read-only review.
